system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_dinhmuc_capphat_xemtruoc","body":"CREATE   PROC [dbo].[TR_DINHMUC_CAPPHAT_XEMTRUOC]
(
	@loaidonhang nvarchar(50),
	@madonhang nvarchar(50),
	@masp nvarchar(MAX) = '',
	@dinhmuc nvarchar(50),
	@loaicapphat nvarchar(50)
)
AS
BEGIN

	--declare @loaidonhang nvarchar(50) = 'SX'
	--declare @madonhang nvarchar(50) = 'RAY-31244'
	--declare @masp nvarchar(MAX) = 'CRL-DW-5-50-0_AKZ010_AA'
	--declare @dinhmuc nvarchar(50) = 'DGO'
	--declare @loaicapphat nvarchar(50)	= 'BEFORE'




DECLARE @TABLE TABLE
(
	madonhang nvarchar(200),
	masp nvarchar(200),
	soluong float
)

IF @loaidonhang = 'SX'
BEGIN
	IF @masp <> ''
	BEGIN
		INSERT INTO @TABLE(madonhang,masp,soluong)
		SELECT b.order_number,a.item_number,a.order_qty 
		FROM tr_order_detail a
		JOIN tr_order b on a.order_number = b.order_number
		WHERE b.order_number = @madonhang and a.f_cancelled = N'N' and 
		a.item_number in (select RTRIM(LTRIM([value])) from dbo.fn_Split(@masp, ','))
	END
	ELSE
	BEGIN
		INSERT INTO @TABLE(madonhang,masp,soluong)
		SELECT b.order_number,a.item_number,a.order_qty 
		FROM tr_order_detail a
		JOIN tr_order b on a.order_number = b.order_number
		WHERE b.order_number = @madonhang and a.f_cancelled = N'N'
	END
	
	IF @dinhmuc = 'GVA'
	BEGIN
		SELECT a.masp,
			a.mact as mavt,
			a.chitiet as mota,
			CONCAT(a.dayy_tc,'*',a.rong_tc,'*',a.dai_tc) as quycach,
			'' as mausac,
			b.madonhang as MaDonDatHang,
			(ISNULL(a.soluong_tc,0) * b.soluong) as soluong
		FROM tr_dinhmuc_govan A 
		INNER JOIN @TABLE B on A.masp = b.masp
	
	END
	ELSE IF @dinhmuc = 'DGO'
	BEGIN
		SELECT a.masp,
			a.madonggoi as mavt,
			b.mota,
			b.quycach,
			b.mausac,
			c.madonhang as MaDonDatHang,
			(ISNULL(a.soluong,0) * c.soluong) as soluong,
			b.dvt
		FROM tr_dinhmuc_donggoi a
		INNER JOIN tr_material b on a.madonggoi = b.mavt
		INNER JOIN @TABLE C on A.masp = C.masp
	
	END
	ELSE IF @dinhmuc = 'NKI'
	BEGIN
		IF @loaicapphat = 'BEFORE'
		BEGIN
			SELECT a.masp,
				a.mavt,
				b.mota,
				b.quycach,
				b.mausac,
				c.madonhang as MaDonDatHang,
				(ISNULL(a.soluong,0) * c.soluong) as soluong,
				b.dvt
			FROM tr_dinhmuc_ngukim a
			INNER JOIN tr_material b on a.mavt = b.mavt
			INNER JOIN @TABLE C on A.masp = C.masp
			WHERE a.HWforWW = 1 
		END
		ELSE IF @loaicapphat = 'AFTER'
		BEGIN
			SELECT a.masp,
				a.mavt,
				b.mota,
				b.quycach,
				b.mausac,
				c.madonhang as MaDonDatHang,
				(ISNULL(a.soluong,0) * c.soluong) as soluong,
				b.dvt
			FROM tr_dinhmuc_ngukim a
			INNER JOIN tr_material b on a.mavt = b.mavt
			INNER JOIN @TABLE C on A.masp = C.masp
			WHERE a.HWforPacking = 1
		END
		ELSE IF @loaicapphat = 'AI'
		BEGIN
			SELECT a.masp,
				a.mavt,
				b.mota,
				b.quycach,
				b.mausac,
				c.madonhang as MaDonDatHang,
				(ISNULL(a.soluong,0) * c.soluong) as soluong,
				b.dvt
			FROM tr_dinhmuc_ngukim a
			INNER JOIN tr_material b on a.mavt = b.mavt
			INNER JOIN @TABLE C on A.masp = C.masp
			WHERE a.HWforAI = 1
		END
	END
	ELSE IF @dinhmuc = 'SON'
	BEGIN
		IF @loaicapphat = 'SONTRONG'
		BEGIN
			SELECT a.masp,
				a.mact as mavt,
				b.mota,
				b.quycach,
				b.mausac,
				c.madonhang as MaDonDatHang,
				(ISNULL(a.sl_sp,0) * c.soluong) as soluong,
				b.dvt
			FROM tr_dinhmuc_son a
			INNER JOIN tr_material b on a.mact = b.mavt
			INNER JOIN @TABLE C on A.masp = C.masp
			WHERE a.sontrongsanpham = 1 
		END
		ELSE IF @loaicapphat = 'SONNGOAI'
		BEGIN
			SELECT a.masp,
				a.mact as mavt,
				b.mota,
				b.quycach,
				b.mausac,
				c.madonhang as MaDonDatHang,
				(ISNULL(a.sl_sp,0) * c.soluong) as soluong,
				b.dvt
			FROM tr_dinhmuc_son a
			INNER JOIN tr_material b on a.mact = b.mavt
			INNER JOIN @TABLE C on A.masp = C.masp
			WHERE a.sontrongsanpham = 0 
		END
	END
END
ELSE
BEGIN
	IF @masp <> ''
	BEGIN
		INSERT INTO @TABLE(madonhang,masp,soluong)
		SELECT b.maddh,a.masp,a.soluong 
		FROM tr_dondathang_chitiet a
		JOIN tr_dondathang b on a.maddh = b.maddh
		WHERE b.maddh = @madonhang and a.active = 1 and 
		a.masp in (select RTRIM(LTRIM([value])) from dbo.fn_Split(@masp, ','))
	END
	ELSE
	BEGIN
		INSERT INTO @TABLE(madonhang,masp,soluong)
		SELECT b.maddh,a.masp,a.soluong 
		FROM tr_dondathang_chitiet a
		JOIN tr_dondathang b on a.maddh = b.maddh
		WHERE b.maddh = @madonhang and a.active = 1
	END

	SELECT a.masp,
				a.mavt,
				b.mota,
				b.quycach,
				b.mausac,
				c.madonhang as MaDonDatHang,
				(ISNULL(a.soluong,0) * c.soluong) as soluong,
				b.dvt
     FROM tr_dinhmuc_ngukim a
	 INNER JOIN tr_material b on a.mavt = b.mavt
	 INNER JOIN @TABLE C on A.masp = C.masp
	 WHERE a.HWforWW = 1 
END
	

END","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.fn_split","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_material","dbo.tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail"],"writesTables":[],"flags":[],"suggestedTier":"B"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
